args.code: (()=>{for(let key in localStorage){if(key.includes('token')||key.includes('auth')||key.includes('emailjs')){return key+': '+localStorage.getItem(key).substring(0,50);}} for(let key in sessionStorage){if(key.includes('token')||key.includes('auth')||key.includes('emailjs')){return key+': '+sessionStorage.getItem(key).substring(0,50);}} return 'No token found';})()
